data.title: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 16; Forecasted EPS $4.47 (up from $3.77) and revenue $2.47 billion. Share price at $212.57.
data.description: M&T Bank Corporation will unveil its Q4 earnings on Friday, Jan. 16. Analysts predict earnings to reach $4.47 per share, up from $3.77 per share last year. The expected revenue for the quarter is $2.47 billion, an increase from $2.38 billion in the previous year. M&T Bank exceeded expectations in Q3 earnings on Oct. 16. As of Thursday, the company's shares closed at $212.57, marking a 1.3% increase. For more details and the latest analyst ratings, visit Benzinga.

data.title: ARB price forecast: Expected to reach $0.25-$0.28 by Feb 2026. Current price at $0.21 with potential 19-33% increase in 3-4 weeks.
data.description: Arbitrum's (ARB) current price stands at $0.21, indicating neutral momentum. Analysts predict a potential increase of 19-33% in the next 3-4 weeks, bringing the price to the range of $0.25-$0.28. Despite some mixed technical signals, the outlook remains positive for Arbitrum.

data.title: NCAA urges CFTC to tighten rules on college sport prediction markets, including age restrictions and anti-harassment measures.
data.description: The NCAA is urging the CFTC to implement stricter regulations on prediction markets for college sports. The proposed rules include restrictions on age and advertising, as well as measures to prevent harassment. The NCAA is emphasizing the importance of protecting the integrity of college sports and ensuring fair participation in these markets.

data.title: APT price predicted to reach $2.25-$2.43 by January 2026 with potential gains of 25-35% despite current consolidation at $1.80.
data.description: A cryptocurrency called Aptos (APT) is predicted to experience a growth potential of between 25% to 35%. Analysts have set price targets for the coin between $2.25 and $2.43 by the end of the month, despite its current value being $1.80. This suggests an opportunity for investors to potentially gain from the coin's anticipated increase in value.

data.description: On January 16, 2026, Orion Corporation made an announcement to the stock exchange in compliance with regulations at 9:30 EET. data.title: Josie Beverages launches new line of adaptogen energy drinks in the US, featuring sparkling water, caffeine, and new flavors.
data.description: Josie Beverages has introduced a new line of energy drinks in the United States, featuring a unique combination of sparkling water, caffeine, and adaptogens. The company unveiled new flavors, ingredients, and online distribution channels for its products. The announcement was made on January 16, 2026, in Los Angeles. This new energy drink line is set to make waves in the market with its innovative blend of ingredients.

data.title: TRX could reach $0.35 by Feb. Analysts eye $0.32-$0.35 range. RSI 65.96 shows growth potential, MACD needs confirmation for breakout above $0.32.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about TRX's future, with a target range of $0.32 to $0.35. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 65.96, indicating potential for further growth. However, confirmation is needed for sustained breakout above $0.32, as the MACD momentum shows.

data.title: LTC expected to reach $80-85 by Feb 2026. Currently at $72.20, oversold RSI at 33.44. If $68.80 holds, rebound likely.
data.description: The current trading price for Litecoin is $72.20, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates an oversold condition at 33.44. Based on technical analysis, there is potential for LTC to increase to the $80-85 resistance range over the next 3-4 weeks provided that crucial support at $68.80 is maintained.

data.title: Circus partners with MMV Leasing to advance AI robotics systems, aiming to set new industry standard.
data.description: Munich-based company Circus SE, a leading global AI robotics firm with GSIN: A2YN35 and Symbol: CA1, has announced an expansion in its services through a leasing agreement with MMV Leasing GmbH, a subsidiary of Landesbank Baden-Württemberg (LBBW). Nikolas Bullwinkel, CEO and Founder of Circus, predicts this partnership will drive growth significantly and solidify their AI robotics systems as an industry norm. This move will allow customers to acquire products through leasing options, marking a new era for the company.
